markerName: General AI vs Modalia AI (side-by-side comparison)
markerPurpose: 5 comparison pairs · Modalia AI panel highlighted as single trusted choice

generic.name: General AI
generic.sub: A general-purpose AI that produces answers inside a chat window

rows.sub: The session records you input may be used to train the model.
Client records end up mixed across multiple separate chat threads.

rows.key: Past sessions must be re-entered every time
rows.sub: You have to copy-paste previous session summaries and progress notes each time.
Without a counseling context, responses can drift into generic advice.

rows.key: Templates must be specified every time
rows.sub: SOAP notes, institutional forms, and other templates require a fresh prompt each session.

mindthos.sub: A specialized AI agent built for counselors and therapists

rows.key: No AI retraining on your data
rows.sub: Client data is never used to train AI models.
Session records accumulate and are managed in dedicated per-client folders.
Accumulated session records flow naturally into preparation for the next appointment.
Drafts are grounded in counseling expertise and accumulated clinical material.
Session notes, institutional forms, and supervision templates are ready to use.

bottomNote.strong: Modalia AI does not replace the counselor's judgment.
bottomNote.rest: It keeps session records safe and helps carry them forward to your next appointment.
